caption: Three regiments of different size -- Spearmen (Tight), Infantry (Normal), Archers (Loose) -- box-selected and dragged into a flank line under the new default form-up mode: equal depth (space basis). Every regiment forms up to the same PHYSICAL depth rather than the same rank count; Tight and Normal share the same spacing, but the loosely-spread Archers split the line differently from both, splitting on density rather than just soldier count. See how-to-play.qmd for the other three selectable modes (☰ Menu → Form-up, or the Y key to cycle).
